Question: What is the average actuation force (gf) for these three specific switches: Gateron Milky Yellow smooth linear batch A (medium-ramp linear travel with progressive resistance curve; subtle tactile hint optimized for longform typing comfort), Kailh Box White tactile-click hybrid (short-hopped clicky travel with crisp actuation onset; rounded tactile hump designed for cushioned typist feedback), and NovelKeys Cream friction-tuned linear (extended travel tactile with rounded compression and plush finish; pronounced tactile bump with audible thock and firm return)?

Question: What is the average ScaleLength for these three guitars: (1) the instrument from LuthierBatch "LB-2024-B3 limited series — pre-torrefied top, player-setup" with BodyTonewood "sitka hybrid top (laminate/two-piece) with torrefied maple back — controlled resonance", TopBracingPattern "asymmetric hybrid bracing — voice-tuned for balanced projection", and NeckProfile "rounded D profile with reinforced volute for player-oriented stability"; (2) the instrument from LuthierBatch "LB-2022-G9 retro run — domed bracing, warm midrange" with BodyTonewood "Sitka spruce top laminated maple back and sides — bright articulation, stage-ready", TopBracingPattern "double-top brace lattice — damping-controlled resonance and clarity", and NeckProfile "slim taper C with extended upper fret comfort and satin finish"; and (3) the instrument from LuthierBatch "LB-2024-E5 signature run — asymmetric hand-scallop, museum finish" with BodyTonewood "spruce top with layered sapele back and sides — consistent, studio-friendly tone", TopBracingPattern "arched brace compound — studio-voiced with tight low-end definition", and NeckProfile "radiused C medium with compound taper and subtle shoulder relief"?
